name: CDD Levels and Triggers
description: Customer Due Diligence levels with triggers and required measures

rows.When Required: Low-risk customers, listed companies, public administrations

rows.Key Measures: ID verification, beneficial owner ID, purpose of relationship, ongoing monitoring

rows.When Required: PEPs, high-risk countries, complex structures, correspondent banking
rows.Key Measures: Source of funds/wealth, senior management approval, enhanced monitoring, additional documentation
